name: House Shelk
summary: Road-policing, fashion-patronage, and harmony-centered noble house governing Shelk’s cultural power.
motive: Keep trade secure, fashion prestigious, and Shelk visibly harmonious without surrendering political leverage.
power_relations: Relies on the Roadwardens and Fashion Artisans Collective while balancing neighboring houses
visible_membership_base: Nobles, attendants, Roadwardens, artisans, estate staff, merchants.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Harmony is part of statecraft, so embarrassment and public disorder hit House Shelk harder than blunt scarcity alone.
